scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    TRIM(CAST(recepcion_id AS NVARCHAR))        AS recepcion_id,
    TRIM(nro_lote)                              AS nro_lote,
    TRIM(CAST(almacen_id AS NVARCHAR))          AS almacen_id,
    TRIM(CAST(transportista_id AS NVARCHAR))    AS transportista_id,
    TRIM(CAST(vehiculo_id AS NVARCHAR))         AS vehiculo_id,
    TRIM(fecha_recepcion)                       AS fecha_recepcion,
    TRIM(CAST(cantidad_recibida AS NVARCHAR))   AS cantidad_recibida,
    TRIM(unidad)                                AS unidad,
    TRIM(condicion)                             AS condicion,
    TRIM(estado)                                AS estado,
    TRIM(responsable)                           AS responsable,
    TRIM(nro_guia_remision)                     AS nro_guia_remision,
    TRIM(CAST(temperatura_llegada AS NVARCHAR)) AS temperatura_llegada
FROM bronze.agenciasedem_recepciones',

fecha_recepcion = iif(isNull(fecha_recepcion) || trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toDate('1900-01-01'), coalesce(toDate(trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', '')), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', '')), 'dd/MM/yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', '')), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', '')), 'dd-MM-yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_recepcion, '"', '')), 'yyyyMMdd'))),

derivedColumn1 derive(nro_lote = iif(isNull(nro_lote) || trim(replace(nro_lote, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(nro_lote, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', 'Sin Lote', upper(trim(replace(nro_lote, '"', '')))),

nro_guia_remision = iif(isNull(nro_guia_remision) || trim(replace(nro_guia_remision, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(nro_guia_remision, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), trim(replace(nro_guia_remision, '"', ''))),

condicion = case(     upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) == 'BUENO' || upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) == 'B', 'BUENO',     upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) == 'REGULAR' || upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) == 'R', 'REGULAR',     upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) == 'MALO' || upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) == 'M', 'MALO',     isNull(condicion) || trim(replace(condicion, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()),     upper(trim(replace(condicion, '"', ''))) ),

estado = case(     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'RECIBIDO' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'R', 'RECIBIDO',     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'PENDIENTE' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'P', 'PENDIENTE',     isNull(estado) || trim(replace(estado, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()),     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) )) ~> derivedColumn2
